_note: Baseline counts of axe-core violations as of v1.7.4 + a11y sweep 2026-05-13. The CI gate fails when any critical/serious rule INCREASES vs these numbers. Refresh by re-running `A11Y_REBASELINE=1 COVERAGE=1 ./run-tests.sh` and copying the printed JSON over this file (after fixing some violations or accepting the new shape). Don't lower these numbers without an actual fix — the gate would lock in the new lower bound. Remaining: color-contrast (white-on-accent buttons + status-pill rgba blends + a few dim accents) and nested-interactive (light-env disclosure heads). Both tracked for follow-up.
